character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A hunched coastal cultist in seaweed-tangled dark-teal robes, barefoot with webbed toes. Fish-belly pale skin with faint scale-patches on neck and forearms. Bulging unblinking eyes, too-wide mouth, gills slit beneath jawline. Clutches a barnacle-crusted idol of a tentacled figure in one hand, a rusted curved ritual knife in the other. Damp hair plastered to skull. A faint green tentacle-shadow curls behind them, half-seen. Palette: deep teal `#1A3A3A`, sickly sea-green `#5C8F8F`, bog green `#2F5F3F`. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
